name: E-Tech
title: E-Tech: Vanilla Recipes for AAI Industry + QoL Toggles
author: Eli Tellez
description: Restores vanilla recipes while keeping everything AAI Industry adds (Krastorio 2 aware - restores to K2's values when K2 is installed, and never stomps recipes other mods own). Plus optional startup toggles, all defaulting to vanilla behavior: pick up/re-place the crashed ship, all modules in beacons, quality in asteroid crushing/reprocessing, nuclear fuel & artillery shell stack sizes, agricultural science pack spoilage, restore the nuclear fuel crafting Krastorio 2 removes, uranium bacteria on Gleba (revival of the abandoned Simple Gleba Uranium mod), and an experimental teleport-to-player toolbar shortcut for multiplayer.
